pageMetadata.title: IndieGabo | Game Developer
pageMetadata.description: Portfolio of IndieGabo featuring games, tools, assets, talks and professional experience in Unity, C# and multiplayer systems.

footer.originalMadeWith: Originally made with ❤️ by DeveloperFolio Team

githubContent.bio: Hey! I am a game and assets developer using Unity and C#.

repoDescriptions.sprite-animations: A smooth and intuitive way to work with sprite sheets in Unity.
repoDescriptions.handy-fsm: A handy finite state machine solution for Unity.
repoDescriptions.ryzen-sandbox: A 2D platformer sandbox created to study and test Unity's 2D feature set.

greeting.title: Hey, I'm Gabo!
greeting.subTitle: An indie games and assets developer, streamer and speaker from Brazil 🇧🇷.

skillsSection.title: What I do
skillsSection.subTitle: I build games in C# with Unity. I specialize in 2D, but I am comfortable taking on projects of any shape or scale.
skills: ⚡ Custom editor windows and tooling with UI Toolkit.
⚡ Composition-oriented programming focused on scalable systems.
⚡ My web development background helps a lot when building multiplayer experiences.

schools.desc: I graduated as a systems analyst focused on internet-based solutions.

experience.desc: Part-time work on the Magic Land mobile game.
descBullets: Responsible for establishing the multiplayer networking layer
Responsible for the C# HTTP requests flow and structure
Acts as the glue between Unity and the backend

experience.desc: Responsible for the tooling and features behind the games built by the studio.

bigProjects.title: Games I have worked on
bigProjects.subtitle: A selection of games where I contributed as a developer or game designer.

projects.projectDesc: A mobile game made in Unity by the Estante Magica team. I am currently part of the development team, and it is the most robust game project I have worked on so far.
A Unity game jam project built around the theme "Illusions". We had the pleasure of winning the jam with this submission.
A Unity game jam project built around the theme "Collateral Effect". Winner in the best theme fit category.

assetsProjects.title: Assets I have created
assetsProjects.subtitle: Tools and assets I built for the community.

projects.projectDesc: A smooth and intuitive way to work with sprite sheets in Unity. Free and open source.

achievementSection.title: Achievements and Certifications 🏆

achievementsCards.title: Google Code-In Finalist
achievementsCards.subtitle: First Pakistani selected as a Google Code-In finalist among 4000 students from 77 different countries.

achievementsCards.title: Google Assistant Action
achievementsCards.subtitle: Developed a Google Assistant Action called JavaScript Guru, available on billions of devices worldwide.

achievementsCards.title: PWA Web App Developer
achievementsCards.subtitle: Completed certification from SMIT for PWA web app development.

blogSection.title: Blogs
blogSection.subtitle: I enjoy writing about development and sharing what I learn along the way.

blogs.title: Win a Google Assistant T-shirt and $200 in Google Cloud Credits
blogs.description: Do you want to win $200 and a Google Assistant T-shirt by creating a Google Assistant Action in less than 30 minutes?

blogs.title: Why React Is the Best?
blogs.description: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces, maintained by Facebook and a wide community of developers and companies.

talkSection.title: Talks
talkSection.subtitle: I love to share what I know and keep learning in public 😅
